# Developer Task Template

## Developer
[Name]

## Branch
`feature/[issue#]-[short-desc]`

## Issue
#[NUMBER] — [Title]

## Objective
[One sentence: what must be delivered]

## Files To Change
- [file1]
- [file2]

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] [Criterion 1]
- [ ] [Criterion 2]
- [ ] [Criterion 3]

## Out Of Scope
- [What not to touch]

## Contracts
- [Relevant contract/standard sections]

## Workflow
1. Create branch from `develop`
2. Implement (use AI template if needed)
3. Test locally — mobile + desktop
4. Push branch
5. Create PR → `develop`
6. Assign Mighty as reviewer
7. Address feedback if needed
8. Merge after approval

## Done When
- [ ] Works correctly
- [ ] Permissions correct
- [ ] Mobile responsive
- [ ] No console errors
- [ ] PR approved by Mighty
- [ ] Jason tested
